title: PMWPACK (protomanlys weather)
description: This modpack is built around ProtoManly’s Weather, offering a dynamic and immersive weather system that significantly enhances atmosphere and environmental realism.
body:
This modpack is mainly built around ProtoManly’s Weather to make the game feel more immersive with better storms and atmosphere. It also has shaders, better lighting, backpacks, vein mining, and tree chopping.

The mods were picked to work well together and keep the game balanced without adding a bunch of unnecessary stuff.
